LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id openai/gpt-4-0613 (the GPT-4 API snapshot), default prompt strategy [score corrected during adversarial verify: proposed 8.68 -> 8.67, per verifier: Verified against https://lk.instruct.kr/ (LogicKor official leaderboard) directly via three independent fetches, all consistent. The model openai/gpt-4-0613 with "default" prompt strategy is real and present (rank ~32), but its total score is 8.67, not the claimed 8.68. Sub-category scores for that row: Reasoning 9.42, Mathematics 7.07, Writing 9.35, Coding 9.50, Comprehension 8.35, Grammar 8.35 — the unweighted mean of these six is 52.04/6 = 8.673, which rounds to 8.67, confirming 8.67 is the correct displayed total (not 8.68). No unit mismatch, no wrong-model mixup, and no benchmark-variant confusion: gpt-4-0613 is indeed distinct from the GPT-4 Turbo variants (Nov 2023 / Apr 2024 / Jan 2025) also on the leaderboard, whose default-prompt scores are 9.17, 8.66, and 9.13 respectively — none of which is being conflated here. Model/benchmark identity and prompt-strategy match the claim; only the score digit is off by 0.01, likely a transcription slip. Recommend correcting corpus/models/openai/gpt-4.json's logickor entry score from 8.68 to 8.67.]

LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id openai/gpt-4-1106-preview (matches catalog's 2023-11-06 GPT-4 Turbo release), default prompt strategy [score corrected during adversarial verify: proposed 9.18 -> 9.1, per verifier: Fetched lk.instruct.kr directly and parsed the embedded logickor_v2_scores dataset (245 records). Exactly two records exist for model_id "openai/gpt-4-1106-preview": (1) prompt_strategy "1-shot", avg=9.095238095238095 (≈9.10); (2) prompt_strategy "cot-1-shot", avg=8.976190476190476 (≈8.98). There is NO "default" prompt-strategy record for this model_id at all — that part of the claimed provenance is fabricated. The claimed score 9.18 does not match either real record. Best real match is the 1-shot avg, ≈9.10 (or 9.09 if truncated rather than rounded to 2dp). A separate, different model_id ("openai/gpt-4-0125-preview", default strategy, avg=9.13) exists in the dataset and could be a source of confusion but is a different snapshot, not GPT-4 Turbo (1106) per the catalog's release date. Recommend updating the result to score=9.10, source note "1-shot prompt strategy" (or 8.98 for cot-1-shot if that variant is preferred), and removing the incorrect "default prompt strategy" characterization.]

This is a small (0.01) discrepancy that looks like an unrounded/rounded transcription slip rather than a wrong-model or wrong-variant mixup (the 1-shot variant score of 8.84 is further off and not the source of the "8.8" figure; it's most likely 8.79 was rounded to 8.8 losing precision). Note: LogicKor is archived (as of Oct 2024) but the leaderboard data itself remains accessible and unchanged at the source URL, so the source is valid and reachable. Recommend correcting the stored score to 8.79 to match the source exactly.]

LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id mistralai/mixtral-8x22b, default prompt strategy [score corrected during adversarial verify: proposed 3.93 -> 6.79, per verifier: Verified directly against https://lk.instruct.kr/ (LogicKor official leaderboard). The site does list mistralai/mixtral-8x22b, but the claimed score (3.93) and claimed prompt strategy ("default") are both wrong. Actual leaderboard entry (row 100): model_id `mistralai/mixtral-8x22b`, 141B params, apache-2.0, prompt strategy **"1-shot"** (there is no "default"-strategy row for this model at all — I searched all rows containing "mixtral" and found only three: mixtral-8x22b/1-shot, mixtral-8x7b-instruct/cot-1-shot, mixtral-8x7b-instruct/1-shot). Category scores: Reasoning 6.00, Math 6.07, Writing 5.92, Coding 8.78, Comprehension 6.78, Grammar 7.21, Singleton 6.95, Multiturn 6.64. **Total/overall score: 6.79** (on LogicKor's 0–10 scale). 3.93 does not match the total (6.79) nor any individual category score, so this isn't a unit conversion or category-vs-total mixup I can explain — the number appears simply fabricated or transcribed from a different model/benchmark. The model result is real and the correct total score to record is 6.79, sourced from mistralai/mixtral-8x22b with prompt strategy "1-shot" (not "default"). Side note: corpus/models/mistral-ai/mixtral-8x22b.json currently has no "logickor" entry in its results array at all (only mmlu, gsm8k, math), so this appears to be a proposed new addition — if added, use score 6.79 and correct the prompt-strategy note to "1-shot". Also note: LogicKor's leaderboard was archived as of 2024-10-17 per the GitHub repo, so evaluatedAt should reflect a pre-archival date if not already specified.]
